# scale(to:duration:)

**Type Method**

Creates an action that changes the x and y scale values of a node.

## Declaration

```swift
class func scale(to scale: CGFloat, duration: TimeInterval) -> SKAction
```

## Parameters

- **scale**: The new value for the node’s x and y scale values.
- **duration**: The duration of the animation.

## Return Value

A new action object.

## Discussion

When the action executes, the node’s [doc://com.apple.spritekit/documentation/SpriteKit/SKNode/xScale] and [doc://com.apple.spritekit/documentation/SpriteKit/SKNode/yScale] properties are animated to the new value.

This action is not reversible; the reverse of this action has the same duration but does not change anything.

## Animating the Scaling of a Node

- **scale(by:duration:)**: Creates an action that changes the x and y scale values of a node by a relative value.
- **scale(to:duration:)**: Creates an action that changes the x and y scale values of a node to achieve
- **scaleX(by:y:duration:)**: Creates an action that adds relative values to the x and y scale values of a node.
- **scaleX(to:y:duration:)**: Creates an action that changes the x and y scale values of a node.
- **scaleX(to:duration:)**: Creates an action that changes the x scale value of a node to a new value.
- **scaleY(to:duration:)**: Creates an action that changes the y scale value of a node to a new value.
